languages.text: Найденные улики указывают на Изимонда. Стоит проверить, достаточно ли их, чтобы убедить Ларию в виновности блюстителя.

traits.locale_text: Найденные улики указывают на Изимонда. Стоит проверить, достаточно ли их, чтобы убедить Ларию в виновности блюстителя.

languages.text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.
languages.original_text: Найденные улики указывают на Изимонда. Стоит проверить, достаточно ли их, чтобы убедить Ларию в виновности блюстителя.

traits.locale_text: The evidence points to Isimond. It must be determined whether it is sufficient to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt.

The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.
The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

languages.text: Die Beweise belasten Isimond. Ob sie ausreichen, um Laria von der Schuld des Enforcers zu überzeugen, bleibt abzuwarten.
languages.original_text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

traits.locale_text: Die Beweise belasten Isimond. Ob sie ausreichen, um Laria von der Schuld des Enforcers zu überzeugen, bleibt abzuwarten.

languages.text: Les preuves désignent Isimond comme responsable. Reste à savoir si elles seront suffisantes pour convaincre Laria que le prévôt est coupable.
languages.original_text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

traits.locale_text: Les preuves désignent Isimond comme responsable. Reste à savoir si elles seront suffisantes pour convaincre Laria que le prévôt est coupable.

languages.text: 现有证据都指向伊西蒙德。但这些证据是否足以让菈丽雅相信这个执法者有罪，还有待观察。
languages.original_text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

traits.locale_text: 现有证据都指向伊西蒙德。但这些证据是否足以让菈丽雅相信这个执法者有罪，还有待观察。

languages.text: Las pruebas apuntan a Isimond. Aún está por ver si bastan para convencer a Laria de la culpa del guardia.
languages.original_text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

traits.locale_text: Las pruebas apuntan a Isimond. Aún está por ver si bastan para convencer a Laria de la culpa del guardia.

languages.text: 我々が見つけた証拠はイシモンドを指している。ラリアに守護者の罪を納得させるのに十分かどうか、見てみる価値はある。
languages.original_text: The evidence we found points to Isimond. It's worth seeing if it's enough to convince Laria of the guardian's guilt.

languages.text: Kanıtlar, İsimond'u işaret ediyor. Bunun Laria'yı infazcının suçluluğuna ikna etmeye yetip yetmeyeceği henüz belli değil.
languages.original_text: The evidence points to Isimond. Whether it is enough to convince Laria of the enforcer's guilt is still to be seen.

traits.locale_text: Kanıtlar, İsimond'u işaret ediyor. Bunun Laria'yı infazcının suçluluğuna ikna etmeye yetip yetmeyeceği henüz belli değil.
